Who We Are

More Than Coffee A Community Built on Quality

Farmers Capital Support is a Rwandan coffee cultivation and export company dedicated to delivering premium coffee from the heart of Nyamagabe District to international markets. Our work is rooted in quality agriculture, strong farmer relationships, and a deep respect for the land that makes our coffee truly unique.


We believe coffee tells a story one of dedication, community, and opportunity. Every bean we cultivate represents the hard work of local farmers, the natural beauty of Rwanda, and our unwavering promise to meet global standards of excellence.


Get to Know Us

Our Story

Rooted in the Hills of Nyamagabe

Located in one of Rwanda's most fertile and breathtaking coffee-growing regions, Farmers Capital Support was built on a simple but powerful vision: to grow outstanding coffee and connect it to markets far beyond our borders.

Our journey is inspired by the people behind the coffee the farmers, workers, and communities whose tireless effort makes every harvest not just possible, but extraordinary.

Ideal Climate

Nyamagabe's altitude and rainfall create perfect conditions for specialty-grade coffee.

Rich Soil

Volcanic soils packed with minerals give our beans their distinctive, full-bodied character.

Tradition & Craft

Generations of coffee-growing wisdom shapes every decision we make on the farm.

Global Ambition

From our hills to your cup we are building bridges between Rwanda and the world.

What We Do

Our Services & Activities

From the first seedling to the final shipment, we are involved in every step of bringing exceptional Rwandan coffee to the world.

Coffee Cultivation

We grow quality coffee with meticulous care, from planting through to harvest nurturing each plant to express its full flavour potential in Nyamagabe's exceptional terroir.

Quality Management

Rigorous standards are maintained at every stage of production. We ensure that every lot of coffee leaving our operation meets the highest benchmarks for consistency and flavour.

Coffee Processing

Careful handling and expert processing techniques preserve the value and unique character of each bean, protecting what makes our coffee truly worth savouring.

Export Services

We supply premium Rwandan coffee to partners and buyers across international markets, handling logistics and documentation to make the process seamless for our clients.

Farmer Empowerment

We invest in the people behind the product supporting sustainable growth, better practices, and improved livelihoods within the farming communities we work with.

Supply & Partnership

We are more than suppliers we are long-term partners. We work closely with buyers and distributors to build relationships grounded in trust, reliability, and mutual growth.

Why Choose Us

A Coffee Partner You Can Rely On

We combine local expertise, agricultural commitment, and export ambition to deliver coffee and partnerships that stand the test of time.

01

Premium Quality, Always

We never compromise on the standards of our coffee. Every harvest is managed with a single goal to produce something truly exceptional.

02

Strategic Growing Location

Nyamagabe District is celebrated for its ideal altitude, rainfall, and soils natural advantages that give our coffee its remarkable depth and character.

03

Community-Centred Approach

Strong communities are the backbone of great coffee. We invest in the people behind every harvest and believe their wellbeing is inseparable from our success.

04

Reliability & Integrity

We build lasting relationships through honesty, consistency, and professionalism values that guide every conversation, contract, and shipment.

05

Global Vision, Local Roots

Our ambitions are international, but our foundation remains firmly rooted in Rwanda its land, its people, and its remarkable coffee heritage.

Our Mission

Cultivating Excellence, Creating Impact

To cultivate and export high-quality Rwandan coffee while creating lasting value for farmers, contributing to community development, and showcasing Rwanda's excellence in global coffee markets.

Our Vision

A Trusted Leader in Rwandan Coffee

To become a recognised leader in coffee cultivation and export known internationally for quality, sustainability, and the positive impact we create within Rwanda and beyond.

Our Values

What We Stand For

Quality

We hold our coffee and ourselves to the highest standard, every single time.

Integrity

We do business with honesty, transparency, and genuine respect for every partner.

Sustainability

We farm responsibly, protecting the environment and the communities we rely on.

Partnership

We grow stronger through meaningful collaboration with farmers, buyers, and communities.

Excellence

We are driven by a continuous desire to improve, innovate, and deliver our very best.

Sustainability

Committed to Coffee That Cares

We understand that truly great coffee begins with healthy land, responsible practices, and empowered people. That's why everything we do is guided by a commitment to long-term productivity, environmental stewardship, and social impact.

We are building a future where coffee farming continues to open doors for local communities while protecting the natural resources that make quality production possible for generations to come.

Responsible Land Use
Water Stewardship
Community Uplift
Eco Processing

Export

Bringing Rwandan Coffee to International Markets

From the hills of Nyamagabe to discerning buyers around the world we deliver coffee with a story, a purpose, and an unwavering standard of excellence. We welcome importers, distributors, and roasters who share our passion for exceptional origin coffee.
